subject: Mathematics
overall_learning_objectives: Calculate the Median for odd and even numbers of observations
Construct and interpret Double Bar Graphs
Predict outcomes using probability (Certain, Impossible, Likely)
Analyze complex data sets to draw conclusions

lesson_plan.title: Median and Double Bar Graphs
topics_covered: Finding the middle value (Median) in ordered data
Comparing two sets of data simultaneously
Interpreting growth or decline from double bars
teaching_strategy: Comparative analysis of two years of data
student_activities: Draw a double bar graph for 'Temperature in Two Cities'

lesson_plan.title: Chance and Probability
topics_covered: Predicting outcomes with dice, coins, and marbles
teaching_strategy: [Image of probability scale from impossible to certain]
student_activities: Calculate the probability of picking a red ball from a bag of mixed colors
List all possible outcomes of rolling two dice

teacher_tip: Students often forget to arrange data in order before finding the Median. Make it a 'Mantra': Median? MUST order first!
